behavior_summary: U8P_BROKEN::look is a simple 'U8P_BROKEN::look' (examine) handler that displays a single short description to the player: the bark text 'debris '.

When the engine invokes the U8P_BROKEN::look process (processType 0x0208) for this object/NPC, the handler unconditionally emits the bark and then suspends/ends the process; there are no branches, menus, calls, or flag changes.
This script functions as the short/inspect text for a broken/debris object or area and does not interact with game state beyond showing the text.
notable_control_flow: Entry is unconditional: no IfStatements, no menus, no flag checks — the U8P_BROKEN::look process executes deterministically.
Single output node (Bark) followed by a suspend/termination; no further nodes or external interactions occur after the bark.
open_questions: Is the trailing space in the bark text 'debris ' intentional (formatting artifact) or meaningful for concatenation with other text at runtime? (low confidence)
Unknown nodes present in the raw may represent a minimal prologue/epilogue around the bark; they do not appear to affect gameplay but their exact purpose is unclear (low confidence).

main_function.name: U8P_BROKEN::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown to the player when they examine this object/NPC; emits a single bark 'debris ' and then suspends the process.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player performs a 'U8P_BROKEN::look' or 'examine' action on the object (processType 0x0208).
No additional in-script conditions; runs whenever the engine calls the U8P_BROKEN::look handler for this instance.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_BROKEN::look is a simple 'U8P_BROKEN::look' (examine) handler that displays a single short description to the player: the bark text 'debris '.
